{{- $image := .Destination -}} {{- if strings.Contains $image "/static/" -}} {{- $parts := split $image "/static/" -}} {{- if gt (len $parts) 1 -}} {{- $image = printf "/%s" (index $parts 1) | relURL -}} {{- end -}} {{- else if strings.HasPrefix $image "/" -}} {{- $image = $image | relURL -}} {{- end -}}
